example: The colors of the painting began to fade over time.
The photo had blurry edges due to the camera shaking.
I could hear the echo of my voice in the empty hall.
The concept slipped right through my head during the lecture.
zh: 完全沒理解，從腦中溜走

example: We need to redefine our goals for the new project.
The spark between them was obvious from the start.
zh: 火花，火星；比喻激發的情感或靈感

example: I feel like I belong in this community.
The tree cast a long shadow on the ground.
I have fond memories of my childhood.
The warmth of the sun made the day pleasant.
The fire left behind only ashes.
The boat began to drift away from the shore.
The clarity of the water was amazing.
The song seemed to slide on repeat in my mind.
He was holding on fire despite the challenges.
After the breakup, she found it hard to move on.
